hero.title: Your garden in the best hands
Your garden in the best hands. Well-kept, clear and professionally maintained.
hero.text: {{companyName}} provides high-quality garden care for private and business clients in Southern Styria.
hero.imageAlt: Gardener pushes a wheelbarrow with a plant through a well-kept garden.

services.title: Everything for a well-kept garden
services.description: From regular care to targeted seasonal support.

hedge.title: Hedge and shrub trimming
hedge.description: Professional pruning for healthy plants and a neat overall look.

lawn.title: Lawn care
lawn.description: Mowing, scarifying, fertilizing and soil improvement tailored to the season.

beds.title: Flower bed care
beds.description: Clean beds and structured planting areas around your home.

trees.title: Tree and green trimming
trees.description: Safe and clean maintenance for smaller trees and ornamental shrubs.

season.title: Seasonal service
season.description: Spring and autumn service including leaf work and winter preparation.

ongoing.title: Ongoing property care
ongoing.description: Regular support for private gardens, residential complexes and small businesses.

why.title: Trust comes from clean work
why.description: Our goal is long-lasting quality in every detail.

reliable.title: Reliable execution
reliable.text: Clear schedules, transparent services and clean work.

punctual.title: Punctual & plannable
punctual.text: We work in a structured way and keep agreed time slots.

personal.title: Personal support
personal.text: Direct contact person and tailored solutions for your garden.

about.title: Regionally rooted. Personal in contact.
about.description: We know the regional conditions and focus on sustainable care.
about.text: Our team works with clear processes and honest advice.

servicesPage.heroTitle: Individual garden care instead of standard packages
servicesPage.heroText: Every garden has different needs. We create a suitable care concept.
servicesPage.sectionDescription: All services can be booked individually or as a full package.
servicesPage.hedgeDescription: Shape and maintenance trimming for healthy structures.
servicesPage.lawnDescription: Regular mowing, scarifying, fertilizing and site-specific care.
servicesPage.bedsDescription: Care of perennials and ornamental beds including pruning.
servicesPage.greenDescription: Safe trimming for smaller trees, shrubs and ornamentals.
servicesPage.seasonDescription: Spring prep, autumn service, leaf work and winter prep.
servicesPage.ongoingDescription: Regular maintenance based on a fixed interval plan.

aboutPage.heroTitle: Professional garden care with regional focus
aboutPage.heroText: As a regional garden care company, we stand for reliable service and honest advice.
aboutPage.sectionDescription: We analyze your garden carefully and recommend only what helps.
aboutPage.body: Our goal is a well-kept garden that fits your everyday life.

contactPage.heroTitle: We look forward to your request
contactPage.heroText: Whether ongoing care or a one-time project, we respond quickly.
contactPage.formDescription: Tell us your request. We will contact you personally.

cta.title: Would you like to place your garden in reliable hands?
cta.text: We prepare a clear offer and ensure clean, on-time execution.

footer.claim: Professional garden care with dependable quality in Southern Styria.

impressum.heroText: Please replace the following placeholders with your complete legal company data.
impressum.businessPurpose: Business purpose: Garden care and green area maintenance

privacy.title: Information on data processing
privacy.heroText: This page is a starting point and must be replaced by a legally reviewed privacy policy.
privacy.section1Text: The responsible entity for data processing is the operator of this website.
privacy.section2Text: Personal data is processed only to the necessary extent, for example in contact inquiries.
privacy.section3Text: When submitting a request, entered data may be used to process the request.
privacy.section4Text: You have the right to information, correction, deletion, restriction of processing and objection.
privacy.notice: Note: This text is a placeholder and does not replace legal advice.

homeExtras.heroText: Reliable support for private gardens, company grounds and residential complexes in Leibnitz, Graz, Deutschlandsberg and Southeast Styria.
homeExtras.servicesDescription: Services clearly structured and easy to scan.
homeExtras.whyDescription: What you can rely on for every job.
